'''badhata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabney|kabney]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabney|kabney]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| badhata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædhætæth|bædhætæth]] || [[word:bædhætæj|bædhætæj]] || [[word:bædhætæsh|bædhætæsh]] || [[word:bædhætæ|bædhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhadhatath|badhadhatath]] || [[word:badhadhataj|badhadhataj]] || [[word:badhadhatash|badhadhatash]] || [[word:badhadhata|badhadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhatath|badhatath]] || [[word:badhataj|badhataj]] || [[word:badhatash|badhatash]] || [[word:badhata|badhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhaftath|badhaftath]] || [[word:badhaftaj|badhaftaj]] || [[word:badhaftash|badhaftash]] || [[word:badhaftaf|badhaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhatatha|badhatatha]] || [[word:badhataja|badhataja]] || [[word:badhatasha|badhatasha]] || [[word:badhataka|badhataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhatath|badhatath]] || [[word:badhataj|badhataj]] || [[word:badhatash|badhatash]] || [[word:badhata|badhata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhatathal|badhatathal]] || [[word:badhatajal|badhatajal]] || [[word:badhatashal|badhatashal]] || [[word:badhatakal|badhatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhatathatha|badhatathatha]] || [[word:badhatajaja|badhatajaja]] || [[word:badhatashasha|badhatashasha]] || [[word:badhataka|badhataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhatathan|badhatathan]] || [[word:badhatajan|badhatajan]] || [[word:badhatashan|badhatashan]] || [[word:badhatakan|badhatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhatathaoro|badhatathaoro]] || [[word:badhatajaoro|badhatajaoro]] || [[word:badhatashaoro|badhatashaoro]] || [[word:badhatakaoro|badhatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
